question: Implement a `Vector2D` class with `x` and `y` coordinates. Create a `getLength()` method that calculates the magnitude of the vector and mark it as a `const` method. Demonstrate calling this method on a `const Vector2D` object.
driver: int main() { std::cout << std::fixed << std::setprecision(10); double x, y; std::cin >> x >> y; Vector2D vec(x, y); std::cout << vec.getLength() << std::endl; const Vector2D constVec(x, y); std::cout << constVec.getLength(); return 0; }
